name: Big Picture
title: Big Picture by HTML5 UP
description: Fullscreen photography-focused portfolio with immersive visual storytelling. Fixed top navigation with section links. Each section fills the entire viewport with a large background image. Intro section with centered greeting. 'What I Do' and 'Who I Am' sections use floating content boxes (right-aligned then left-aligned) over fullscreen backgrounds. Gallery section with 6 thumbnails in a 2-column masonry-like layout with lightbox popup viewer (poptrox). Contact section with form (name, email, message). Footer with 6 social media icons. Sections use alternating dark overlays. Smooth scroll between sections with anchor navigation.

colorPalette.background: #ffffff (body, but sections use dark bg images)
colorPalette.heading: #ffffff

typography.letterSpacing: wide (0.025em) for body, tight (-0.05em) for headings
typography.style: Extreme weight contrast — ultra-light body with black headings. Very large base font. Cinematic, impactful typography.

layoutDetails: Each section is 100vh fullscreen with background-size: cover. Fixed top navigation. Content boxes float left/right within sections. Gallery uses 2-column layout with poptrox lightbox. Smooth scrolling between anchored sections. No container max-width — content boxes are positioned within fullscreen sections.
visualStyle: Cinematic, immersive, photography-first. Fullscreen background images with dark overlays. Floating translucent content boxes. Sage green accent on dark backgrounds. High contrast typography. Gallery with lightbox. Dramatic visual storytelling.

name: Image Survey
title: Image Survey HTML Form by templatemo
description: Survey/form template designed for image-based questionnaires. Header has a large comments icon and site name on the left, Contact Us button on the right. A parallax banner image spans the full width. Intro section with descriptive text left and a teal highlighted quote block right. The form contains 3 questions: Q1 uses 5 radio-button choices each with a 3x2 landscape image in a horizontal row. Q2 uses 5 checkbox choices with 1x1 square images in a 2-column layout. Q3 uses 5 radio choices with 2x3 portrait images. Q4 is a text input. A teal Submit button at the bottom. Clean white background with teal accent color.

typography.style: Larger body text (18px) for readability in survey context, semi-bold headings

layoutDetails: Bootstrap container. Single-page form layout. Flexbox for choice containers. Materialize CSS for radio/checkbox styling. Parallax background image banner.
visualStyle: Clean white survey template with teal accents, image-based answer choices in various aspect ratios, and clear question hierarchy.

name: Snapshot
title: Snapshot HTML CSS Web Template
description: Photography/creative portfolio single-page template with a full-screen Vegas background slideshow in the hero section that cycles through multiple images with transition effects. Fixed top navigation bar with smooth scroll links. Sections include About/Background with photographer bio and descriptive text, Team section with circular member photos in an Owl Carousel slider showing name and role, Gallery section with image grid using CSS3 hover effects (touch-style overlays revealing titles and descriptions), and Contact section with a three-field form. WOW.js scroll animations bring elements into view. Source Sans Pro typography. Coral/pink accent color on dark backgrounds. Clean, image-focused design optimized for visual portfolios.

typography.style: Source Sans Pro with clean readability, professional for creative portfolios

layoutDetails: Fixed top navbar. Full-screen Vegas slideshow hero. About section with text. Team in Owl Carousel with circular photos. Gallery in CSS3 hover-effect grid. Contact form centered.
visualStyle: Dark creative portfolio with coral accent, full-screen background slideshow, CSS3 hover gallery effects, circular team carousel, and image-focused design.

name: Video Catalog
title: Video Catalog
description: Video catalog multi-page template with a fullscreen autoplay video background hero. The hero features a black logo container with video icon, overlay welcome text, and an animated 'Discover' CTA button. Navigation is a collapsible navbar overlaying the video. Below the hero, content displays video thumbnails in a responsive grid (3 columns on desktop) with title, description, and author info per card. Each card links to a detail page. Pagination at the bottom. About and Contact pages available. Dark header area transitioning to light content. Source Sans Pro typography with teal (#29BBCC) accent color.

typography.style: Clean sans-serif with generous line-height (2em), readable and modern

layoutDetails: Fullscreen video hero with overlay content. Below-fold grid layout for video cards (3-column). Pagination. Multi-page with About and Contact. Bootstrap 4 grid.
visualStyle: Modern video-centric design. Dark hero with autoplay video background, transitioning to clean white content grid. Teal accent for links and buttons. Card-based video thumbnails.

name: Volton
title: Volton Free Responsive Template
description: Photography portfolio single-page template with a fixed left sidebar containing a circular profile photo, photographer name, description, icon-based navigation (Welcome, About Me, My Gallery, Contact Me), and social media icon links. Main content scrolls vertically with sections: Welcome hero with large background image and overlay text, About Me with skills progress bars and personal info, Gallery with filterable image grid (All, Nature, People, Animal categories) using Owl Carousel, and Contact form with validation. Responsive sidebar collapses to top bar on mobile. Dark sidebar with Roboto font family (light/regular/bold weights).

typography.style: Roboto with three weight variants via @font-face. Light body, bold headings for strong contrast.

layoutDetails: Fixed left sidebar (profile + nav) with scrollable main content. Sidebar collapses to responsive top header on mobile. Full-width sections in main area. Owl Carousel for gallery.
visualStyle: Dark sidebar portfolio style. Clean white content sections with blue accents. Circular profile photo. Skills progress bars. Filterable gallery grid. Professional photographer portfolio aesthetic.

name: Exhibit Studio
title: Exhibit — Photography Gallery
description: Minimalist photography gallery template with a clean off-white canvas aesthetic. Opens with a sticky navigation bar featuring a wordmark logo and desktop/mobile menu links. Below, a hero section displays a tag line, a large headline 'Light & Shadow', photo count, and a one-line series description separated by a horizontal rule. A filter toolbar with category buttons (All, Portrait, Landscape, Urban, Nature) sits above a CSS-column masonry gallery of 12 photo thumbnails with hover-reveal captions showing title and location metadata. Clicking any image opens a full-screen lightbox with previous/next navigation, counter, and caption overlay. Footer includes brand name, credit links, and site navigation. Multi-page structure with About and Contact pages linked.

typography.style: Clean sans-serif with wide letter-spacing on labels, clamp-based responsive hero title

layoutDetails: Sticky top navigation with wordmark. Hero section with tag, headline, and meta. CSS-column masonry grid (1-4 columns responsive). Full-screen lightbox overlay. Generous page margins using clamp().
visualStyle: Minimal editorial gallery. Off-white background, no color accents, monochrome palette. Hover reveals dark caption overlay on images. Lightbox uses near-black backdrop. Typography-driven with generous whitespace.

name: Living Parallax
title: Living Parallax | Interactive Gallery
description: Interactive photography gallery template with a dramatic parallax slider and no framework dependencies. Features a full-screen image slider with 9 nature/landscape photographs (Mountain Dreams, Forest Whispers, Ocean Serenity, Golden Hour, Spring Bloom, Desert Vastness, Waterfall Majesty, Wild Encounters, Summit Glory). Each slide displays a large background image with a title overlay and parallax depth effect on mouse movement. Navigation includes dot indicators and arrow buttons. Below the slider, additional sections include an About Us area, a testimonials section with four review cards, a contact form with address details, and a privacy policy section. Footer with copyright. Uses Poppins font with a pure black-and-white color scheme.

typography.style: Bold geometric sans-serif (Poppins) for headings with extra-bold weight. Georgia serif for testimonial quotes. High contrast black-and-white palette.

layoutDetails: Full-screen parallax image slider with dot navigation. Scrollable content sections below. About section, testimonial cards grid, contact form with address info. Privacy policy section.
visualStyle: Dramatic dark photography showcase. Full-screen parallax slider with mouse-tracking depth effect. Pure black-and-white palette. Bold typography overlaid on large images. Cinematic, immersive feel.

name: Winter Gallery
title: Winter Portfolio - Photography Gallery
description: Photography gallery template with a winter/snow theme. Hero section with animated background panels and centered title. Filter buttons (All, Landscapes, Decorations, Food, Family) for category-based gallery filtering. Masonry-style gallery grid with tall and regular items, hover overlays showing title and category. Custom lightbox with prev/next navigation and image info. About section with photographer bio and image. Contact form. Uses Cormorant Garamond serif and Montserrat sans-serif fonts. Cool blue-white color palette.

typography.style: Elegant serif headings with clean sans-serif body

layoutDetails: Single-page with filter buttons. Masonry gallery grid. Custom lightbox. About section. Contact form.
visualStyle: Elegant winter photography gallery with cool blue tones, masonry grid, category filters, custom lightbox.
